rationale: Gov't Code §2306.184 governs disclosure of project development and operation fees for affordable housing applications. It has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: This section does not apply to an application submitted by an individual or family for a loan, grant, or other assistance under a program administered by the department or the Texas State Affordable Housing Corporation or from bonds issued by the department.
_note: No conflict. The rule_text concerns affordable housing fee disclosure; the proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap in subject matter.
